name: hsp-py
description: Python language server using ty - an extremely fast type checker by Astral

hooks.command: sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind session.start ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind prompt ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.before ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.before ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.before ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.after ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.after ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
sh -c 'case "${HSP_HOOKS:-}" in 1|[Tt][Rr][Uu][Ee]|[Yy][Ee][Ss]|[Oo][Nn]) exec uvx --refresh --from git+https://github.com/holo-q/hsp hsp-ty hook --kind edit.after ;; *) cat >/dev/null ;; esac'
